findings.title: Expire access log now records tenant-qualified object keys
findings.impact: When auth is enabled, ConstructNamespaceUriWithTenantId prefixes each requested key with the tenant id before this access record is filled. The previous code logged req.object_keys() directly, but the new access.ObjectKeysRef(objectKeys) writes tenant-qualified namespace URIs to the access log/exporter, exposing tenant identifiers to log readers and downstream log storage.
findings.fix: Keep using tenant-qualified objectKeys for routing, but fill the access recorder from req.object_keys() or strip the tenant prefix with NamespaceUriToObjectKey before calling ObjectKeysRef.
